# AAAttributionError

**Structure**

The error code that the parent class issues.

## Declaration

```swift
struct AAAttributionError
```

## Error domain

- **errorDomain**: The error domain the framework uses when returning errors.

## Error codes

- **internalError**: The server is unable to provide a token because of an internal error.
- **networkError**: The server is unable to provide a token because the internet isn’t available.
- **platformNotSupported**: The server is unable to provide a token because of an unsupported operating system.
- **AAAttributionError.Code**: The error code that the parent class issues.

## Errors

- **AAAttributionErrorDomain**: The framework attribution error domain.
- **AAAttributionError.Code**: The error code that the parent class issues.

## Conforms To

- CustomNSError
- Equatable
- Error
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
